feed.title: Alex Jin
feed.subtitle: Alex Jin's personal website for software development, embedded systems, projects, and notes.

entry.title: Hello, World
entry.content:
Welcome to my technical blog.

This website has grown from a small static homepage into a content-focused site powered by Jekyll and al-folio. It now supports personal information, project pages, and an expanding technical blog.

I plan to write about:

  • Embedded Linux and systems development
  • Problems encountered in software development and how I solved them
  • The design and implementation of open-source projects

To publish a new article, I can add a Markdown file to the _posts directory and push it to GitHub. The site will build and deploy automatically.
entry.summary: My upgraded personal website is ready for technical notes, projects, and ideas.
